hero.title: Inside the CodyMaster
hero.sub: Explore the neural network that powers intelligent coding: 5 memory tiers, 34 specialized skills, automated workflows, and cloud-synced knowledge — all working together in one unified system.

memory.label: Five-Tier Memory
memory.title: A brain that knows what to remember — and what to forget.
memory.desc: Inspired by neuroscience, CodyMaster operates on 5 distinct memory tiers. Each ring in the visualization represents a different persistence layer — from millisecond sensory data to permanent structural understanding.

t1.name: Sensory Memory
t1.desc: Session variables — forgotten instantly after each command.

t2.name: Working Memory
t2.desc: CONTINUITY.md — 7-day active context. Your current task state.

t4.name: Semantic Memory
t4.desc: qmd / vector search — permanent deep search across docs.

t5.name: Structural Memory
t5.desc: CodeGraph / AST — real-time codebase architecture. 95% token compression.

skills.label: 34 Specialized Skills
skills.title: Each node is a dedicated AI expert.
skills.desc: Skills are organized into 6 categories spanning the entire development lifecycle. Each glowing node you see represents a skill — hover them to discover what they do. Skills chain together automatically through workflow orchestration.

cm-brainstorm-idea.name: Brainstorm
cm-brainstorm-idea.desc: Strategic analysis gate for complex ideas.

cm-debugging.name: Debugging
cm-debugging.desc: Root cause analysis and fix validation.

workflow.label: Workflow Orchestration
workflow.title: Skills chain together. Automatically.
workflow.desc: The animated particle streams between nodes represent workflow chains. Each workflow is a pipeline of skills that fire in sequence — from idea to deployed product. No manual coordination needed.
workflow.correction: Skills auto-redirect when complexity is detected: cm-planning detects ambiguity → redirects to cm-brainstorm-idea. The brain self-corrects its workflow path.

cloud.label: QMD Embedding + NotebookLM
cloud.title: Local search meets cloud intelligence.
cloud.desc: The outer sphere represents the knowledge layer. qmd (by Shopify’s Tobi) provides BM25 search across massive local docs — feeding the Semantic Memory tier. NotebookLM extends this to the cloud — syncing high-value knowledge across machines, generating podcasts, flashcards, and queryable endpoints.

features.f1: qmd: Local BM25 search over docs & code

cloud.flow: Data flow: Local Brain → brain-sync.sh → Cloud NotebookLM → Podcast / Flashcards / Query API

cta.title: Give your AI a real brain.
cta.desc: 34 skills. 5 memory tiers. Self-healing intelligence. Cloud-synced knowledge. Install CodyMaster on any AI agent and watch it truly think.
